case_title: SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC., VS. EXIT-CUBE INC.,

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EXIT-CUBE INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-22-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-07-2004
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC. SERVED SEP-06-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EXIT-CUBE INC.
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITIN TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-22-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2004 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). DEC-01-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXIT-CUBE INC. $2,705.18 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $500.99 INTEREST, $288.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,054.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED . FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE CREDIT SERVICES, INC.

BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
